rationale.Q01: Quiet slow-burn. error_rate climbs monotonically 0.02 -> 0.14 across the window (metrics.csv), auto_resolved_after_s null, no recent_deploy, pat-upstream-timeout count 640 / delta +520%. Looks low-grade but is real. Cardinal must_page; conservative models that anchor on 'modest value, no deploy' wrongly suppress it.
rationale.Q02: disk_usage_pct, fired_count_last_1h 13, auto_resolved_after_s 20, value barely over threshold, pat-disk-rotate delta 0%, metric returns to 83 next sample. Chronic flapper.
rationale.Q03: cpu_pct 91 vs 90, auto_resolved_after_s 40, pat-gc-pause delta 3%, metric back to 43 next sample.
rationale.Q05: http_5xx_rate 0.06 vs 0.05, auto_resolved_after_s 44, deploy fe-2026.05.20-a correlated but 5xx drops to 0.003 two minutes later. Recovered deploy churn, different service from the real incidents.
rationale.Q10: Same disk flapper as Q02 (pat-disk-rotate, fired_count 13, auto_resolved_after_s 19), another oscillation.
rationale.Q13: Loud SEV1 root. payments http_5xx_rate 0.62 vs 0.02 and rising 0.62 -> 0.78 (metrics.csv), auto_resolved_after_s null, pat-payments-db-pool count 880 / delta +740%. Clear page; cardinal must_page.
rationale.Q14: payments p99_latency_ms 2400 vs 1200, same service and same root pattern pat-payments-db-pool as Q13, fired within one minute. Symptom of the Q13 db-pool exhaustion; collapses into Q13. Page the root (Q13), suppress the duplicate.
rationale.Q15: Moderate sustained regression. checkout p99_latency_ms climbs 910 -> 1990 across the window (metrics.csv), auto_resolved_after_s null, no deploy, pat-checkout-pool-exhaust delta +380%. Independent real incident, distinct service/root from Q13. Page.
rationale.Q16: inventory http_5xx_rate rising, real, but already owned: incidents_open.json INC-4471 covers inventory / pat-inventory-5xx, opened 09:33, status investigating. A human is on it. Suppress as duplicate of an open incident.
rationale.Q17: promotions http_5xx_rate tagged SEV1 but fired_count_last_1h 9, auto_resolved_after_s 31, 0.21 drops to 0.04 one minute later, deploy promo-2026.05.20-b correlated, pat-promo-rollout delta 4%. Severity-looks-real precision trap: flapping deploy churn that self-healed.
rationale.Q18: gateway-canary error_rate tagged SEV1 but fired_count_last_1h 11, auto_resolved_after_s 22, 0.30 drops to 0.02 next sample, pat-canary-misroute delta 2%. Precision trap: high-value-looking canary flapper that auto-resolved.
